description: Discover a fresh and modern way to promote your food and beverage delivery service with our vibrant, two-column email template. This design perfectly combines shades of light green and white, representing freshness and hygiene, vital aspects of any restaurant business. The template is perfect for showcasing your restaurant's delicious food offerings and promoting the download of your food delivery app. With a dedicated space to highlight your best dishes and a clear call-to-action, your customers will be enticed to try your service. The layout is also ideal for any restaurant seeking to leverage their service promotion efforts. Optimize your email marketing strategy today with this innovative, user-friendly template.
short_description: Promote your food and beverage delivery service with our fresh, two-column email template. Ideal for showcasing your restaurant's offerings and promoting your food delivery app. Perfect blend of light green and white for freshness and hygiene. Optimize your email marketing today.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
